response_engine.notes: Uses Retell-hosted LLM with Custom Functions pointing at our /webhooks/retell/tools adapter. Backend /tools APIs remain unchanged.

voice.recommended_voice: multilingual Indian English / Hindi capable voice from Retell ElevenLabs catalog (e.g. a warm female voice with Hindi support)
voice.notes: Do not pin to English-only. Auto / multilingual enables mid-call code-switching without a translation table.

speech_settings.notes: Retell VAD handles barge-in. Medium-high interruption sensitivity keeps the agent stoppable without cutting off on brief ambient noise.

stt.notes: Use Retell's multilingual ASR. No custom dictionary. Accept Hindi, English, and mixed transcripts.

begin_message: Namaste, thank you for calling Sunrise Multispecialty Clinic. This is Maya — how can I help you today?

post_call_analysis.notes: Optional; evaluation harness comes in a later milestone.
